title: Shri Mansa Mata Mandir Hasampur
tagline: Shri Mansa Mata Mandir Hasampur — spiritual town of Rajasthan

heroImage.alt: Shri Mansa Mata Mandir Hasampur, Rajasthan

overview.short: Mata Mansa Devi is a Hindu temple of Mansa Devi, in Sikar district of Rajasthan state in India.
overview.description: Mata Mansa Devi is a Hindu temple of Mansa Devi, in Sikar district of Rajasthan state in India. The temple complex is spread over 100 acres (0.40 km2) in the Hasampur Hills foothills in village Hasampur, near Neem-Ka-Thana, and Sikar, 20 km from National Highway 8 (India) Kotputli, another noted Devi shrine in the region, both just outside Sikar. It is one of the prominent Shakti temples of North India. Thousands of devotees visit the shrine from various parts of the country, and especially during the Navratra fair, this number rises to lakhs every day for the nine auspicious days.

topPlaces.name: Patan, Rajasthan
topPlaces.description: Patan is a city in the Indian state of Rajasthan. In the 12th century, Patan became the centre of a minor state called Tanwarawati or Torawati, ruled by a Tomar family.

topPlaces.name: Kishor Pura
topPlaces.description: Kishor Pura is a village in Sikar district of Rajasthan State, India. It is located 74 km east of district headquarters Sikar and 106 km from the state capital Jaipur.

topPlaces.name: Maonda
topPlaces.description: Maonda, is a small village located on the Neem-Ka-Thana to Khetri road Rajasthan, India. The village consists three small areas (Maonda khurd, Maonda kalan and Maonda Railway Station).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shri Mansa Mata Mandir Hasampur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shri Mansa Mata Mandir Hasampur is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shri Mansa Mata Mandir Hasampur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jaipur International Airport (107 km) and the nearest railway station is Jaipur Junction (96 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shri Mansa Mata Mandir Hasampur?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shri Mansa Mata Mandir Hasampur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shri Mansa Mata Mandir Hasampur?
faq.a: Stays in Shri Mansa Mata Mandir Hasampur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shri Mansa Mata Mandir Hasampur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Patan, Rajasthan, Kishor Pura, Maonda.
